firnauhi.carnival.tutorial.minesweeper: §eClick here to check out Firnauhis Tutorial for this minigame!
firnauhi.command.waypoint.remove: Removed waypoint %s. Other waypoints may have different indexes now.
firnauhi.command.waypoint.remove.error: Could not find waypoint with that index to delete.
firnauhi.command.waypoint.skip.error: Could not skip a waypoint. Are you in ordered waypoint mode with waypoints loaded?
firnauhi.config.anniversary.pig-hud.desc: A HUD showing rewards pulled from shiny pigs
firnauhi.config.anniversary.shiny-pigs.d: Track rewards from shiny pigs, as well as how much time you have left to collect your pig.
firnauhi.config.auto-completions.warp-co: Auto complete warp destinations in chat. This may include warps you have not yet unlocked.
firnauhi.config.auto-completions.warp-is: Redirects /warp is to /warp island, since hypixel does not recognize /warp is as a warp destination.
firnauhi.config.block-zapper-overlay.blo: Shows what blocks will be zapped
firnauhi.config.block-zapper-overlay.col: The color that the blocks will be highlighted in
firnauhi.config.bonemerang-overlay.bonem: Shows how many targets your bonemerang will hit
Display an overlay that tells you what block you will warp to.
firnauhi.config.bonemerang-overlay.highl: Highlight entities that will be hit
firnauhi.config.carnival.bombs-solver.de: Display bombs surrounding each block in minesweeper.
firnauhi.config.carnival.tutorials.descr: Show a tutorial hint every time you start a game with a Firnauhi tutorial.
firnauhi.config.category.dev.description: Settings for texture pack devs and programmers
firnauhi.config.category.events.descript: Settings for temporary or repeating events
firnauhi.config.category.garden.descript: Features for the No. 1 Macro Free Island on SkyBlock
firnauhi.config.category.integrations.de: Integrations with other mods, as well as texture packs
firnauhi.config.category.inventory.descr: Features for anything that happens in a chest or inventory
firnauhi.config.category.meta.descriptio: Settings for Firnauhi and the item repo
firnauhi.config.category.misc.descriptio: Miscellaneous features that don't fit elsewhere
firnauhi.config.centuryraffle.highlight-: Highlight the players you can feed while holding a Slice of Century Cake
firnauhi.config.chat-links.allow-all-hos: Allow displaying images no matter where it is hosted.
firnauhi.config.chat-links.allowed-hosts: Prevent yourself from requesting images from other servers, to prevent your IP from being leaked.
firnauhi.config.chat-links.image-enabled: Show a preview of images when hovering over links in chat
firnauhi.config.chat-links.position.desc: Edit where the images are shown
firnauhi.config.commissions.highlight-co: Highlight completed commissions in the commission menu
firnauhi.config.compatibility.explosion-: Redirect explosion particles to be rendered by enhanced explosions.
Choose how big explosions will be rendered by enhanced explosions
firnauhi.config.composter.no-more-noises: Muffle all noises and sounds made by the composter
firnauhi.config.configconfig.enable-moul: Uses the MoulConfig config UI. Turn off to fall back to the built in config.
firnauhi.config.configconfig.enable-yacl: Uses the YACL config UI. Turn off to fall back to the built in config. Needs YACL to be installed separately.
firnauhi.config.configconfig.wide-moulco: Use a wider editor for MoulConfig
firnauhi.config.copy-chat.copy-chat.desc: Right click a message to copy
firnauhi.config.custom-skyblock-textures: Allows texture pack authors to re-texture (but not re-model) SkyBlock armors.
Allows texture pack authors replacing block models depending on block position and SkyBlock island.
How long texture models should be cached for.
Disables clearing the cache entirely. Since you will be sent new item stacks from the server if something changes, this should not cause issues.
Allow replacing items for texture packs. Turning this off does not disable custom predicates
Allow texture packs to use some legacy stuff via CIT
Allow texture packs to load textures from some legacy paths. I.e.: Allows loading 1.21.0 armor textures on 1.21.4.
Enable Firnauhi's model predicates. This will apply to vanilla models as well, if that vanilla model has Firnauhi predicates.
Allows texture packs to recolor UI texts.
Allows texture packs to move UI elements like slots around, as well as replace the background of screens.
Allow replacing the textures of placed skulls.
firnauhi.config.developer-capes.show-cap: Allows you to see the developer capes.
firnauhi.config.developer.auto-rebuild.d: Executes ./gradlew processResources before F3+T is executed.
firnauhi.config.diana.ancestral-spade.de: Automatically guess your next burrow based on particles and sounds spawned from the Ancestral Spade's Echo ability.
firnauhi.config.diana.ancestral-teleport: Click to teleport near the guessed burrow.
firnauhi.config.etherwarp-overlay.cube-c: Cube Colour on Fail (Blocks above occupied)
Cube Colour if the warp would succeed, but you will interact with the block instead (you are too close, but no blocks above)
Cube Colour if the warp would succeed, if you were closer (too far away, but no blocks above)
Choose the colour of the etherwarp target block.
firnauhi.config.etherwarp-overlay.cube.d: Displays a full cube on the block
firnauhi.config.etherwarp-overlay.etherw: Display an overlay that tells you what block you will warp to.
firnauhi.config.etherwarp-overlay.failur: Show a text in game explaining why the teleport fails.
firnauhi.config.etherwarp-overlay.only-s: Displays the Etherwarp overlay only while sneaking.
firnauhi.config.etherwarp-overlay.wirefr: Displays a full outline on the block
firnauhi.config.fairy-souls.reset.descri: Reset all collected fairy souls, allowing you to restart from null.
firnauhi.config.fairy-souls.show.descrip: Show unclaimed Fairy Soul waypoints in the world you are currently in.
firnauhi.config.fishing-warning.display-: Display a warning when you are about to hook a fish
firnauhi.config.fixes.auto-sprint-hud-to: Whether or not to show the sprint state hud
firnauhi.config.fixes.auto-sprint-hud.de: Show your current sprint state on your screen. Only visible if no auto sprint keybind is set.
firnauhi.config.fixes.auto-sprint-keybin: Toggle auto sprint via this keybinding.
firnauhi.config.fixes.auto-sprint-underw: Also Toggle Sprint under water. Sprinting under water puts you in the swimming animation which changes your camera and hitbox, which can be confusing if you stop and start moving a lot.
firnauhi.config.fixes.auto-sprint.descri: This is different from vanilla sprint in the way that it only marks the keybinding pressed for the first tick of walking.
firnauhi.config.fixes.disable-hurt-cam.d: Disable the damage screen shake animation.
firnauhi.config.fixes.hide-mob-effects.d: Hide Potion effects on the right side of your player inventory.
firnauhi.config.fixes.hide-off-hand.desc: Remove the off-hand slot from your inventory
firnauhi.config.fixes.hide-potion-effect: Hides the potion effects HUD in the top right.
firnauhi.config.fixes.hide-recipe-book.d: Remove the recipe book from your inventory
firnauhi.config.fixes.hide-slot-highligh: Hide slot highlights for items with disabled tooltip. This makes /sbmenu look nicer with smooth texture packs.
firnauhi.config.fixes.peek-chat.descript: Hold this keybinding to view the chat as if you have it opened, but while still being able to control your character.
firnauhi.config.fixes.player-skins.descr: Mark all player skins as signed, preventing console spam, and some rendering issues.
firnauhi.config.inventory-buttons-config: Hovering over inventory buttons will show the command they run.
Only shows buttons while in the inventory
Click anywhere to create a new inventory button or to edit one. Hold SHIFT to grid align.
firnauhi.config.item-hotkeys.global-trad: Press this button to search the hovered item on the bazaar or auction house.
firnauhi.config.item-rarity-cosmetics.ba: Show item rarity background in the hotbar.
Show a background behind each item, depending on its rarity.
Show custom block descriptions and hardness levels in Jade.
firnauhi.config.jade-integration.progres: Show the custom mining progress in Jade, when in a world with mining fatigue.
firnauhi.config.junk-highlighter.descrip: Highlight items using regex to search for items in your inventory
firnauhi.config.junk-highlighter.highlig: Highlight found items when this keybind is held
firnauhi.config.junk-highlighter.regex.d: The RegEx (Regular Expression) to use when searching
firnauhi.config.lore-timers.format.descr: Choose the time format in which resolved timers are displayed.
firnauhi.config.lore-timers.show-creatio: Shows the creation or craft timestamp of the item. Sometimes this timestamp is retained when upgrading an item, so it isn't necessarily the craft time of this specific item, but rather one of its components.
firnauhi.config.lore-timers.show.descrip: Shows when a timer in a lore (such as interest, auction duration) would end.
firnauhi.config.missing-enchantments.ena: Shows missing enchantments in a tools tooltip if a keybind is pressed
firnauhi.config.missing-enchantments.sho: Show enchantments that conflict with already applied enchantments (e.g., different ultimate enchantments)
Keybinding to show missing enchantments on items
Show which enchantments can be upgraded to higher levels inline with existing enchantments
Prevent people from spamming commands with a delay between party commands.
firnauhi.config.party-commands.enable.de: Allow people in your party to use commands like !warp, !coords, !ptme and so on. See /firm partycommands for a list
firnauhi.config.party-commands.ignore-ow: Prevent your own messages from triggering party commands
firnauhi.config.pets.highlight-pet.descr: Highlight your currently selected pet in the /pets menu.
firnauhi.config.pets.pet-overlay-hud-sty: Determines the style of the Pet Info Hud.
firnauhi.config.pets.pet-overlay-hud.des: A HUD showing information about your currently active pet. Make sure the pet widget is enabled and visible in /tablist for full accuracy.
firnauhi.config.pets.pet-overlay.descrip: Shows current active pet and pet exp on screen.
firnauhi.config.pickaxe-info.ability-col: Color of the cooldown indicator around the cross-hair.
firnauhi.config.pickaxe-info.ability-coo: Shows a toast when your pickaxe ability is ready.
Show a cooldown on your cross-hair for your pickaxe ability.
firnauhi.config.pickaxe-info.ability-sca: Resize the cooldown around your cross-hair for your pickaxe ability.
firnauhi.config.pickaxe-info.disable-in-: Disables the cooldown around your cross-hair while in Dungeons.
firnauhi.config.pickaxe-info.fuel-bar.de: Replace the item durability bar of your drills with one that shows the remaining fuel.
firnauhi.config.pickaxe-info.show-on-too: Show pickaxe ability cooldowns only on some tools. Notabene: Not all tools have support for pickaxe abilities so you might need to swap to your drill to activate the abilities.
firnauhi.config.power-user.copy-animated: Copy animated skin previews when spawned from Elizabeth.
Press this button to copy the NEU repo SkyBlock id. This is not the raw id, but instead contains some extra transformations for things like runes, pets and enchant books.
firnauhi.config.power-user.copy-item-sta: Copy the entire item stack metadata. This can be used in tests to recreate the item in code.
firnauhi.config.power-user.copy-lore.des: Copy the items name and lore as json encoded text
firnauhi.config.power-user.copy-nbt-data: Copy only the ExtraAttributes, so the hypixel specific item data.
firnauhi.config.power-user.copy-skull-te: Copy the texture location that can be used to re-texture the skull under your cross-hair. This will work for placed skulls, as well as those in your inventory.
firnauhi.config.power-user.copy-texture-: Copy the texture pack id that is used for the item stack under your cursor.
firnauhi.config.power-user.dont-highligh: Removes the highlight from items that contain a semicolon e.g Pets or Enchanted Books.
firnauhi.config.power-user.entity-data.d: Print out information about the entity under your cross-hair.
firnauhi.config.power-user.export-item-s: Exports the hovered item to the repo data folder
firnauhi.config.power-user.export-npc-lo: Export the NPC's location to the repo data
firnauhi.config.power-user.export-recipe: Export Recipe Data to the repo data
firnauhi.config.power-user.highlight-non: Highlights items that don't exist in the repo.
Show the SkyBlock id of items underneath them.
firnauhi.config.price-data.avg-lowest-bi: Select if and for how long the AVG Lowest BIN should show.
firnauhi.config.price-data.bz-price-type: Select which type of bazaar prices should be shown.
firnauhi.config.price-data.enable-always: Show item auction/bazaar prices on SkyBlock items
firnauhi.config.price-data.enable-keybin: Only show auction/bazaar prices when holding this keybinding. Unbind to always show.
firnauhi.config.price-data.stack-size-ke: Press this key while hovering over an item to show its price multiplied by the number of items you have.
firnauhi.config.pristine-profit.fine-gem: Use the (more stable) price of fine gemstones, instead of flawed gemstones.
firnauhi.config.pristine-profit.position: Edit the pristine profit hud location.
Track the profit you make from pristine gemstones while mining. Set to 0 seconds to disable the HUD.
firnauhi.config.quick-commands.dh.descri: Warps you to the dungeon hub.
firnauhi.config.quick-commands.join.desc: Join various types of instances like dungeons using short hands like /join f1, /join k1, /join m7
firnauhi.config.repo.branch.description: Git Branch to pull item data from.
firnauhi.config.repo.disable-item-groups: Disabling item groups can increase performance, but will no longer collect similar items (like minions, enchantments) together.
firnauhi.config.repo.enable-rei.descript: REI is required for viewing Firnauhis item list. If you want to use another item list provider like SkyBlockers, you can turn it off here. Without other mods this will make you revert back to the vanilla item list.
Always use super craft when clicking the craft button in REI, instead of just when holding shift.
firnauhi.config.repo.perfect-renders.des: Speed up item list loading by allowing items to be loaded in partially incorrectly at first. They will be corrected down the line when the background reload completes.
firnauhi.config.repo.reload.description: Force reload the item list. This will not download the item list again.
firnauhi.config.repo.reponame.descriptio: The GitHub repository name to pull item data from.
firnauhi.config.repo.username.descriptio: The GitHub repository organization to pull item data from.
firnauhi.config.repo.warn-for-missing-it: Warn if there is no compatible item list mod, like REI, installed.
firnauhi.config.save-cursor-position.ena: Save your cursor position when switching GUIs.
firnauhi.config.save-cursor-position.tol: Select how long your cursor position last between GUIs before resetting back to the middle of the screen.
firnauhi.config.slot-locking.bind-only-i: Only allow using slot binds in the player inventory, not in chests, etc.
firnauhi.config.slot-locking.bind-render: Disable rendering of the slot binding lines (or all of the slot binding rendering), unless the relevant slot is being hovered.
firnauhi.config.slot-locking.bind.descri: Bind a hotbar slot to another slot. This allows quick switching between the slots by shift clicking on either slot.
firnauhi.config.slot-locking.drop-in-dun: Allow dropping items in dungeons, to use your dungeon ultimate abilities.
firnauhi.config.slot-locking.hunting-box: The Hunting Box frequently changes its UUID, and as such cannot be reliably protected using UUID locking. Instead this option can be used to block from dropping any Hunting Box.
firnauhi.config.slot-locking.lock-bind.d: Prevent moving bound slots, except for slot quick moving.
firnauhi.config.slot-locking.lock-uuid.d: Lock a SkyBlock item by it's UUID. This blocks a specific item from being dropped/sold, but still allows moving it around.
firnauhi.config.slot-locking.lock.descri: Lock a slot, preventing any item from being moved from, dropped from, or placed into this slot.
Allow binding the same hotbar slot to multiple inventory slots.
firnauhi.config.slot-locking.require-qui: If turned off, allows to switch between bound slots without holding shift.
firnauhi.config.storage-overlay.always-r: Always replace the ender chest with Firnauhi's storage overlay.
firnauhi.config.storage-overlay.block-it: Disables scrolling the storage overlay screen while you are hovering over an item. Useful if you have a tooltip scrolling mod.
firnauhi.config.storage-overlay.height.d: The height of the scrollable storage panel.
firnauhi.config.storage-overlay.highligh: Change the colour of the highlighted search result.
Highlight the search results in the ender chest overlay.
firnauhi.config.storage-overlay.inactive: Show item tooltips when hovering over items on pages other than the active one.
firnauhi.config.storage-overlay.inverse-: Invert the mouse wheel scrolling in Firnauhi's storage overlay.
firnauhi.config.storage-overlay.margin.d: Margin inside of the storage overview.
firnauhi.config.storage-overlay.outline-: Change the colour of the border around your selected storage page.
Put a border around the selected storage page in the storage overlay.
Padding inside of the storage overview.
firnauhi.config.storage-overlay.retain-s: Retain scroll position when closing storage overlay and overview.
firnauhi.config.storage-overlay.rows.des: Max columns used by the storage overlay and overview.
firnauhi.config.storage-overlay.scroll-s: Scroll speed inside of the storage overlay and overview.
firnauhi.config.wardrobe-keybinds.allow-: Allow unequipping items via wardrobe hotkeys.
firnauhi.config.wardrobe-keybinds.slot-1: Keybind to toggle the first set in your wardrobe
firnauhi.config.wardrobe-keybinds.slot-2: Keybind to toggle the second set in your wardrobe
firnauhi.config.wardrobe-keybinds.slot-3: Keybind to toggle the third set in your wardrobe
firnauhi.config.wardrobe-keybinds.slot-4: Keybind to toggle the fourth set in your wardrobe
firnauhi.config.wardrobe-keybinds.slot-5: Keybind to toggle the fifth set in your wardrobe
firnauhi.config.wardrobe-keybinds.slot-6: Keybind to toggle the sixth set in your wardrobe
firnauhi.config.wardrobe-keybinds.slot-7: Keybind to toggle the seventh set in your wardrobe
firnauhi.config.wardrobe-keybinds.slot-8: Keybind to toggle the eighth set in your wardrobe
firnauhi.config.wardrobe-keybinds.slot-9: Keybind to toggle the ninth set in your wardrobe
firnauhi.config.wardrobe-keybinds.wardro: Lets you use your number keys to quickly change your wardrobe
firnauhi.config.waypoints.reset-order-on: Resets Ordered Waypoint progress after swapping to another world.
firnauhi.config.waypoints.show-index.des: Show the number of an ordered waypoint in the world.
firnauhi.config.waypoints.skip-to-neares: Allow skipping waypoints in an ordered list. If disabled you will need to walk to the next point, before being allowed to the next one after.
firnauhi.config.waypoints.temp-waypoint-: Display waypoints sent by other players using /firm sendcoords in the world.
firnauhi.hotmpreset.copied: Collected all HOTM perks to clipboard. Use /firm importhotm to import.
firnauhi.hotmpreset.failedimport: Could not find a HOTM perk preset in your clipboard. You can export your current HOTM perks with /firm exporthotm
firnauhi.hotmpreset.scrolled: Just scrolled. Waiting on server to update items.
firnauhi.hotmpreset.scrollprompt: We need to scroll! Please click anywhere to continue.
firnauhi.inventory-buttons.delete: Hold L-CTRL and click to delete
firnauhi.inventory-buttons.import-failed: One of your buttons could only be imported partially
firnauhi.poweruser.entity.name: Entity Name: %s
firnauhi.quick-commands.join.explain: Join a dungeon or kuudra floor by using commands like /join f1, /join m7, /join fe or /join khot
firnauhi.recipe.mobs.name: §8[§7Lv %d§8] §c%s
firnauhi.recipe.novanilla: Hypixel cannot super craft vanilla recipes
firnauhi.reiwarning: Firnauhi needs RoughlyEnoughItems to display its item list!
firnauhi.reiwarning.disable: Click here to disable this warning
firnauhi.reiwarning.disabled: Disabled the RoughlyEnoughItems warning. Keep in mind that you will not have an item list without REI.
firnauhi.repo.reload.disk: Reloading repository from disk. This may lag a bit.
firnauhi.warp-util.clear-excluded: Marked all /warp commands as potentially available.
firnauhi.warp-util.mark-excluded: Firnauhi: Tried to warp to %s, but it was not unlocked. I will avoid warping there again.
firnauhi.warp-util.no-warp-found: Could not find an unlocked warp in %s
zzzzzzzzz.lastentry: Here so every real firnauhi entry has a trailing ,
